caption: A man wearing a tall, spiky grey wig, glasses, and headphones sits in a studio for a recording. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt, a small red bow tie, and white suspenders. He sits behind a black professional microphone on a boom arm. The background is a wall covered in numerous small framed photographs and a yellow "LEE" garment. To his left, a white shelf holds various items, including a black bag. On-screen logos for "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" appear on both the left and right sides of the frame. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking; his mouth opens and closes, and he gestures with his right hand, which becomes more visible as he moves it toward the center of the frame. The scene remains static except for his facial expressions and hand movements.
